title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF KALAMANSIG CENTRAL ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF KALAMANSIG, PROVINCE OF COTABATO, TO DATU GUIABAR CENTRAL ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. NO. 1550 / 65 OG No. 11, 2558 (March 17, 1969)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 5089, June 17, 1967 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF KALAMANSIG CENTRAL ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF KALAMANSIG, PROVINCE OF COTABATO, TO DATU GUIABAR CENTRAL ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Kalamansig Central Elementary School in the Municipality of Kalamansig, Province of Cotabato, is hereby changed to Datu Guiabar Central Elementary School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 17, 1967.
